/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/RC_Vehicle_terminal.dir/src/BuzzerController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RC_Vehicle_terminal.dir/src/LocalCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RC_Vehicle_terminal.dir/src/LocalCommandsListener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RC_Vehicle_terminal.dir/src/LocalCommandsListenersObserverSingleton.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RC_Vehicle_terminal.dir/src/MainController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RC_Vehicle_terminal.dir/src/gamepad/GamepadController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RC_Vehicle_terminal.dir/src/gamepad/GamepadDataStruct.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RC_Vehicle_terminal.dir/src/gamepad/KeyboardController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RC_Vehicle_terminal.dir/src/gamepad/KeyboardDataStruct.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RC_Vehicle_terminal.dir/src/gpio/PinCommon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RC_Vehicle_terminal.dir/src/gpio/PinsInitializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RC_Vehicle_terminal.dir/src/gpio/ReleasePinHardware.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RC_Vehicle_terminal.dir/src/gpio/ReleasePinSoftware.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RC_Vehicle_terminal.dir/src/gpio/SinglePinActor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RC_Vehicle_terminal.dir/src/gpio/SoftwarePin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RC_Vehicle_terminal.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RC_Vehicle_terminal.dir/src/preferences/PreferencesLoader.cpp.o -o RC_Vehicle_terminal  -Wl,-rpath,/home/mgdsstudio/Embedded/Programming/RC_Vehicle_terminal/build/_deps/sdl3-build _deps/sdl3-build/libSDL3.so.0.5.0
